user_query: Check the balance of my SMSAPI.com account. Retrieve the replies history from the sms77io tool. Can you also fetch the recent messages from my_channel on the PubNub Network?

TaskList.description: Retrieve the account balance from SMSAPI.com.
Retrieve the replies history from the sms77io tool.
Fetch the recent messages from my_channel on the PubNub Network.
